event.description:
[Granite](https://www.ibm.com/granite) is a family of open, performant, and trusted AI models, tailored for business. We will conduct a hands-on in-person Granite workshop for developers at One Madison, in NYC from noon-5pm Tuesday December 10. At the end of the session you will have a practical understanding of where Granite will be helpful to you.
Prerequisites are

* 1) a device with Python 3.11 and Jupyter Notebook installed, or
* 2) a device with a browser and GitHub and Google accounts

See [https://ibm.github.io/granite-workshop/](https://ibm.github.io/granite-workshop/)
**You must register here to attend [https://www.ibm.com/events/reg/flow/ibm/XG223QMB/landing/page/landing](https://www.ibm.com/events/reg/flow/ibm/XG223QMB/landing/page/landing)**

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: Granite Models Hands-On Workshop for Developers at  One Madison, NYC
